summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. Security-sensitive WhatsApp PRs are routed to central security handling; unrelated non-security PRs are kept open for ordinary maintainer review or independent follow-up. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix PR mutation is planned.
